name: Lewd Bottle
descrip: A small, oddly shaped magical device that sprays out aphrodisiac, automatically refilling when you put energy into it. Can not be in a stance.
statusOutcome: [AttackerName] use a small device to spray some pink mist at [TargetName]'s face, and [TargetHeOrShe] soon becomes flush with lust!
statusMiss: [AttackerName] use a small device to spray some pink mist at [TargetName]'s face, but [TargetHeOrShe] seems completely unaffected!
